pinterest_cluster_labels: dark minimalist bedroom — black walls + vertical wood slats
moody luxe bedside styling — brass lamps & layered bedding
Japandi noir living room — smoked oak slats, shoji screens & bonsai

cluster_summary.label: dark minimalist bedroom — black walls + vertical wood slats
cluster_summary.visual_notes: Matte black walls and ceiling, vertical walnut/smoked oak slat accent, low wood platform bed and matching nightstands, charcoal linens, thin pendant lights and warm cove LED. Stage with a single small plant, minimal bedside objects, and expansive glazing to balance heaviness.

cluster_summary.label: moody luxe bedside styling — brass lamps & layered bedding
cluster_summary.visual_notes: Upholstered dark headboard, layered neutrals (light gray sheets + charcoal duvet), sculptural brass dome bedside lamps, floating shelves with curated ceramics/art, recessed LED strip behind ribbed panel. Stage with textured throws and 1–2 sculptural metallic accents for warmth.

cluster_summary.label: Japandi noir living room — smoked oak slats, shoji screens & bonsai
cluster_summary.visual_notes: Matte black tadelakt or painted walls, smoked oak vertical slats, low charcoal linen sectional, monolithic black marble coffee table, frosted shoji screens and a single bonsai for organic focus. Stage with a neutral woven rug, low clutter, and tactile cushions to emphasize calm minimalism.
